entries.title: On Num 25:1
entries.excerpt: This incident has a double Old Testa ment reference: to Israel which, in taking possession of the land of Canaan, "began to play the harlot"28 with the daughters of Moab," by worshipping such fertility gods as aal-eor (Num. 25:1 ); and, at the same time, we have the picture o…
